title: arenaria tetraquetra var. oscensis
intro: Arenaria tetraquetra var. oscensis, also known as the Alpine Sandwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the pink or white flowering Caryophyllaceae family. The Alpine Sandwort has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's health benefits include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. Alpine Sandwort can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to be used for topical applications or as a natural remedy for digestive issues.
